title: Define Income and Name Alignment Metadata AI guidelines for Suco Home Improvement
description: Create and validate classifier guidelines for the Suco - Home Improvement Income and Name Alignment Metadata AI score so reviewers and the model share the same class definitions and decision criteria.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Initial guidelines work completed for Suco - Home Improvement / Income and Name Alignment Metadata AI; see story plx-e523d0 for validation and pushed version details.
